text: I stand before a glass enclosure tinged with futuristic violet light, peering into a space revealed as "R+D"—a research and development zone. The words and displays inside promise innovation and human collaboration. Entering, I'm enveloped by the language of possibility, surrounded by artifacts of intention—objects, screens, books, and green lights, all nudging the boundaries of knowledge. I feel both anticipation and humility here; the sterile walls contrast with the bold ambitions on display. The world outside seems to fade, replaced by a microcosm pulsing with ordered potential. I sense the fragile optimism of those who hope their work might shape a more thoughtful, interconnected tomorrow. It is inspiring, and a little daunting, to be immersed in such a concentrated atmosphere of creative curiosity.
